---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Stellar Clash
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the motivation behind it. For example:
> "I'm always frustrated when [...]"
> "It would improve the game experience if [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see implemented. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Game Area

Which part of the game does this feature relate to?

- [ ] Bluetooth / Networking
- [ ] Game Engine / Physics
- [ ] Combat / Weapons
- [ ] Power-ups
- [ ] Audio
- [ ] Visual Effects / Particles
- [ ] UI / Controls
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
